_comment: Maps Neo4j Lesson IDs (textbook schema) to ChuDe IDs (curriculum schema).
_comment2: Fill this in after first ingestion run. Query ChuDe IDs with:
_comment3: MATCH (l:Lop)-[:HAS]->(cd:ChuDe) WHERE l.id CONTAINS 'lop_10' RETURN cd.id, cd.ten_chu_de ORDER BY cd.id
_comment4: One Lesson can COVER multiple ChuDe (array). Leave empty until mapping is known.
